elements.original_description: A cheerful cartoon character with a smiling face, wearing casual clothes, standing confidently on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a cheerful cartoon character with a smiling face, wearing casual clothes, standing confidently on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
